sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno spavanja je veoma važno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is very important for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الشَّخْصِ أَنْ يَنَامَ ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Osoba treba da spava najmanje osam sati dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: A person should sleep at least eight hours daily.

sentences.arabic: الرَّاحَةُ الْجَيِّدَةُ تُسَاعِدُ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ أَثْنَاءَ الْعَمَلِ وَالدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dobar odmor pomaže u koncentraciji tokom rada i učenja.
sentences.translationEn: Good rest helps with concentration during work and study.
